description: MCP server for P4 Plan — tasks, sprints, bugs, comments, custom fields via GraphQL API.
name: io.github.perforce/p4plan-mcp

environmentVariables.description: JWT bearer token for the P4 Plan GraphQL API. Forwarded as Authorization on every tool call.
environmentVariables.name: P4PLAN_API_AUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: URL of the P4 Plan GraphQL API (default: http://localhost:4000).
environmentVariables.name: P4PLAN_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to accept self-signed TLS certificates from the GraphQL API. Default: false.
environmentVariables.name: P4PLAN_ALLOW_SELF_SIGNED_CERTS
